policy.approvalRule: Only exact official structured payload matches with hours, terminal, coordinates, and source URL can be approved.
policy.reviewRule: Airport-code-only, link-only, missing-hour, missing-terminal, or unmatched records remain review-only.
policy.lineReviewRule: Every non-Priority Pass candidate must have a reviewAction before catalog promotion.
